scene: Stan lying calm and awake at 3:00 in an old bed, flat dark navy filling the tall frame, big black caps 3 AM.
A tall night timeline split into a FIRST SLEEP block and a SECOND SLEEP block with a gap between, flat dark navy filling the tall frame, big black caps TWO SLEEPS.
A cozy candlelit old bedroom, Stan sitting up awake at midnight between two beds tending a candle, flat warm brown filling the tall frame, big black caps ON PURPOSE.
A glowing Edison lightbulb erasing the midnight gap off the sleep timeline, leaving one block, flat dark navy filling the tall frame, big black caps ONE INVENTION.
Modern Stan lying calm and awake at 3:00 beside a WRONG label crossed out with a red X, flat dark navy filling the tall frame, big black caps NOTHING IS WRONG.
